content.body: oh! gotcha i understand what you're asking
it's being able to in a single operation "take" things out of `Map`

content.body: i.e. get the value for a given key AND delete the key at the same time
i'm looking for something concise to title the proposal in the proposals repo :-)
agh, Arrays still having Array.prototype is unfortunate
i described it as "Read a value and remove it in the same step" in the proposal repo
Map read and remove?
content.formatted_body: Map read and remove?

content.body: primitives still have their prototypes too
arrays we could _conceivably_ make a `FrozenArrayPrototype` which is just a copy with all the same methods but frozen + null protot, but we can't do that for primitives
content.formatted_body: arrays we could conceivably make a FrozenArrayPrototype which is just a copy with all the same methods but frozen + null protot, but we can't do that for primitives

content.body: SGTM

that said, the relevant ES terms (from Map.prototype) are already "get" and "delete", so I would personally go with those
